testCaseName: E2E: Full Hiring Lifecycle with Multiple Jobs, Candidates and Cascading Selections
testCaseDescription: End-to-end hiring lifecycle: Admin/Recruiter/Candidate registration, multiple job creations, multi-job applications, duplicate prevention, multi-stage status updates, cascading selection (ACCEPTED triggers auto-rejection of remaining applicants and job deactivation), cross-job isolation, multi-recruiter independence, post-closure blocking, job deletion and admin user deletion with auth verification

steps.step: Register Admin1 user: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/register
Register Recruiter1: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/register
Register Recruiter2: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/register
Register Candidate1, Candidate2, Candidate3: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/register (x3)
Admin1 logs in and views all registered users: GET http://localhost:5000/api/admin/users
Recruiter1 logs in and creates Job1 (Backend Engineer): POST http://localhost:5000/api/jobs
steps.requestBody:
{
  "title": "Backend Engineer",
  "description": "Java Spring Boot developer",
  "location": "Bangalore, India",
  "company": "CloudNine Technologies",
  "salary": "12,00,000 - 18,00,000",
  "type": "FULL_TIME"
}

steps.step: Recruiter1 creates Job2 (Frontend Developer): POST http://localhost:5000/api/jobs
Recruiter2 logs in and creates Job3 (Data Analyst): POST http://localhost:5000/api/jobs
steps.requestBody:
{
  "title": "Data Analyst",
  "description": "Python and SQL data analyst",
  "location": "Chennai, India",
  "company": "InfoSystems Ltd",
  "salary": "8,00,000 - 12,00,000",
  "type": "FULL_TIME"
}

steps.step: Verify all 3 jobs are active and visible in listings: GET http://localhost:5000/api/jobs
Candidate1 applies to Job1 and Job2 simultaneously: POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications (x2)
Candidate1 attempts duplicate apply to Job1 - expects 400 Bad Request: POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Candidate2 applies to Job1 and Job3; Candidate3 applies to Job2 and Job3: POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications (x4)
Recruiter1 views applications for Job1 only (isolation check): GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/job/1
Recruiter1 updates Candidate1 Job1 application to SHORTLISTED, Candidate2 to REVIEWED: PUT http://localhost:5000/api/applications/{id}/status
Candidate1 verifies dashboard shows SHORTLISTED for Job1 and PENDING for Job2 (real-time cross-job isolation): GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/my
Recruiter1 accepts Candidate1 for Job1 - remaining applicants auto-REJECTED, Job1 deactivated: PUT http://localhost:5000/api/applications/1/status?status=ACCEPTED

Verify Candidate2 auto-REJECTED for Job1 and Job1 deactivated; Candidate1 Job2 still PENDING (cross-job isolation): GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/job/1 + GET http://localhost:5000/api/jobs
Recruiter2 independently accepts Candidate2 for Job3 - Candidate3 auto-REJECTED for Job3, Job3 deactivated: PUT http://localhost:5000/api/applications/4/status?status=ACCEPTED
New candidate (Candidate3) attempts to apply for closed Job1 - expects 400 Bad Request: POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Recruiter1 deletes Job2 (Frontend Developer) - job removed from listings: DELETE http://localhost:5000/api/jobs/2
Verify Job2 no longer in listings and no active jobs remain: GET http://localhost:5000/api/jobs
Admin1 deletes Candidate3 (omkar@test.com): DELETE http://localhost:5000/api/admin/users/6
Verify deleted Candidate3 can no longer authenticate - expects 401 Unauthorized: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login
